targets.notes: COMPLETE. All 11 theorems proved, no sorry. vote_result, majority, yesCount, missingCount, quorum_intersection all formally verified.

PR open. New sub-lemmas added: hfirst_q_ge (proved), hstep_A (structured, needs API), hafter_qth_lt (proved), hstep_B (structured, needs API). committedIndex_monotone FULLY PROVED. Remaining sorry: committedIndex_safety and committedIndex_maximal - only blocker is Finset.card_filter <-> List.countP bridge. Steps B+C+D of the countP chain need exact Mathlib 4.14.0 lemma names: List.Perm.countP_eq, List.countP_map, Finset.card_filter (Multiset.countP form), Multiset.countP_coe.

proof_steps_remaining.bridge: Need exact Lean4 Mathlib 4.14.0 names for: (voters.filter p).card = voters.toList.countP (decide o p). Chain: Finset.card_filter -> Multiset.countP -> Multiset.countP_coe -> List.countP -> List.countP_map -> List.Perm.countP_eq (via sortDesc_perm)
proof_steps_remaining.committedIndex_safety: hstep_A proved (sorted.countP (c<=.) >= q using List.Sublist.countP_le + List.take_sublist). Need bridge to connect countGe = sorted.countP.
proof_steps_remaining.committedIndex_maximal: hstep_B proved (sorted.countP (k<=.) <= q-1 using countP_eq_zero + countP_le_length). Need same bridge.

targets.notes: PR open. Lean spec + implementation model written. limitSizeGo (core accumulator) + limitSizeCount + limitSize. Key: acc=0 OR acc+x<=lim semantics correctly models Rust size==0 branch. Proved: is_prefix, length_ge_one, none/empty/singleton, 6 decide examples. Sorry: limitSize_sum_le (T3) and limitSize_maximal (T4).

proof_steps_remaining.T3_sum_le: Induction on limitSizeGo with invariant: once acc>0, acc<=lim. First entry accepted via acc=0 branch may exceed lim (minimum-one guarantee). T3 requires precondition: sizes[0] > 0.
proof_steps_remaining.T4_maximal: When limitSizeGo stops (returns count without incrementing), condition acc=0 OR acc+x<=lim was false, meaning acc>0 AND acc+x>lim. Since acc<=lim at that point, result.sum + next > lim.

next_steps: Task5: Fix committedIndex_safety and committedIndex_maximal by completing the Finset.card_filter -> List.countP bridge. Use Lean toolchain once available. Key: List.Perm.countP_eq, List.countP_map, Finset.card_filter (Multiset form), Multiset.countP_coe.
Task5: Fix limitSize_sum_le (T3) and limitSize_maximal (T4) by induction on limitSizeGo. Key invariant: 0 < acc -> acc <= lim (holds after first non-zero entry). Precondition: sizes[0] > 0 for T3.
Task3: Consider writing Lean spec for Unstable log buffer (phase 1->3). Key invariants: offset + entries.len() = last_index, snapshot_index <= offset.
build_note: elan/lean toolchain install blocked by network firewall CONNECT tunnel 403. Syntax validated by following MajorityQuorum.lean patterns. Lean toolchain domain: release.leanlang.org needs to be allowlisted.

open_prs.description: LimitSize Lean spec+impl (T3+4) + CommittedIndex proof improvements (T5)
